steps.t: Agátur the Boastful has asked you to plant banners along the road leading to Zudramdân. You should plant banners along the road leading to Zudramdân.
Zudramdân can be found in Elderslade. You should journey to Zudramdân.
Zudramdân can be found in Elderslade. You should talk to Náth at Zudramdân.
Zudramdân can be found in Elderslade. You should talk to Náth at Zudramdân.
